      00:00:00 FINAL HOURS OF OUR CLOSURE SALE
      Timeless Fashion, Curated by Sophie with Passion
      SHOP NOW ⮕

      Welcome to Sophie’s Boutique New York

      After 27 wonderful years of curating elegant fashion, it’s time to say goodbye. I’m Sophie, and my boutique has been more than just a store—it’s been a place where style, grace, and personal connections came together. Every piece in my collection has been chosen with love, and now, as I close this chapter, I’m offering up to 80% off on everything.

      This is your last chance to own a piece of Sophie’s Boutique Hamptons before it’s gone forever. Thank you for being part of this journey—I’m forever grateful for your support!

      CURATED FOR YOU

      Sale
      Adalyn - Chic V-Neck High Waist Mini Dress
      $274.95 $54.95
      Sale
      Addison - Lace-Up Square Collar Sling Dress
      $299.95 $74.95
      Sale
      Adira - Floral Lace Bra & Panty Set
      $159.95 $44.95
      Sale
      Ainsley - Sleeveless Club Party Bodycon Maxi Dress
      $324.95 $64.95

      ABOUT SOPHIE

      For over 27 years, I’ve poured my heart into Sophie’s Boutique, crafting a collection of elegant, timeless fashion pieces that celebrate confidence and individuality. As a mother of two wonderful daughters, I built this boutique not just as a business, but as a passion—curating styles that bring joy, beauty, and sophistication to women like you.

      Now, as I step into a new chapter, Sophie’s Boutique is closing, and I’m offering up to 80% off on my entire collection. This is your last chance to own one of my handpicked designs before they’re gone forever. Once they’re sold, they won’t be back! Thank you for being part of this incredible journey. 💖

      DISCOVER MY STORY

      “A farewell gift to customers”
